ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IsPickVal ( Unqualified_Reason__c ,"Other")&& (IsPickVal (Status__c,"Cancelled") || IsPickVal (Status__c,"Unqualified")) && LEN ( Cancelled_Reason__c )<3 && NOT($Profile.Id='00eb0000000oBvcAAE')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please provide further details for Other reason
